---
name: Policy update
about: Propose updates to social benefit rules based on official sources
title: "[POLICY] "
labels: policy,eligibility,regulation
---

## 🏛 Policy Update Request

---

## 📌 Benefit / Program Name
Which social benefit or program does this relate to?

---

## 📊 Current Rule
Describe the current eligibility rule as it is understood.

---

## 🔄 Suggested Change
What should be updated, corrected, or clarified?

---

## 📚 Source / Reference
Provide an official source if available:

- law
- regulation
- official website
- public document

---

## ⚖️ Impact
Who would be affected by this update?

- [ ] Individuals
- [ ] Vulnerable groups
- [ ] Institutions

---

## 📈 Reason for Update
Why is this change important?

(e.g. outdated rule, incorrect interpretation, missing condition)

---

## 🧠 Additional Notes
Any extra explanation or context.
